PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Petitioner.
Laura Van Zandt (guardian ad litem for the minor) appeared by zoom.

The court stated that excellent work was done here to convince it and that the only open issue is taking care of Ms. Van Zandt's fees. Ms. Van Zandt stated that she does not have a ton of time in, that she maybe has two hours prior plus today and that she is happy to be paid out of escrow when they sell the property. Mr. Wrobel stated that it seems very reasonable. The Petition for Spousal Property is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Continued To Feb-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Continued To Dec-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel, via ZOOM, for Fariha Syed; Syed Hassan Shah, Interested Party.

The court notes the issue with interaction between codes and points Mr. Wrobel to both the published and unpublished portions RE the Estate of Wall. The court also advises Mr. Wrobel that currently, the court is not comfortable proceeding with this matter without appointing a Guardian ad Litem (GAL) and preferably the appointment of an attorney who practices Family Law as GAL. The court then queries Mr. Wrobel if he plans on filing an amended ex parte petition for appointment of GAL or a new petition. Mr. Wrobel advises that he plans to file a new ex parte petition. The court confirms with Mr. Wrobel that it would like a comment from the GAL as soon as they are appointed.

The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to Dec-20-2021 at 9: am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Continued To Oct-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Continued To Aug-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel, via ZOOM, for Fariha Syed, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking counsel if he has reviewed the Examiner's notes. Counsel reports that he has discussed with his client and reports that all proceeds have been earned during marriage and there are bank statements showing spouse's name to support the preceding. The court then notes the issue with the minor and advises counsel that it doesn't appear as though a disclaimer is in the best interest of the minor and suggests that an appointment of a Guardian ad Litem would be best. Counsel believes that it has been proven that the property is communal property therefore the appointment of a Guardian ad Litem is not required.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Spousal Property is continued to August 30, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
